name: Waldgeist

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Tangling Roots
actions.costs_and_restrictions: While this model is in severe terrain, increase this action's Rg by +3".

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Hexed Gambit
triggers.text: Target must have a Stunned token. This model may discard and draw a card.

triggers.name: Choking Hollow
triggers.text: Make a Bog marker in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: The Woods Have Eyes
actions.effects: Target gains Stunned and Poison tokens.

triggers.name: Foot in the Bog
triggers.text: Make a Bog marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your face deck. This model may discard it.

merge_warnings: Tactical action 'The Woods Have Eyes' has resist='Wp' â€” may be attack action under tactical header (layout exception). Reclassifying as attack_action.
extraction_notes: The Woods Have Eyes appears under Attack Actions header but has Wp resist and creates tokens (not typical direct damage), parsed as tactical action based on structure and (magic) type indicator.
